name: linkedin-company-post
title: Post to a LinkedIn company page
description: Shippable TEMPLATE (method only, no personal data). The spine: open the company admin composer and stage one ticket's caption. The full image + Voyager photo-tag + verified-post flow is the `cook-linkedin.mjs` driver, configured at run time via env: LOOP_LI_COMPANY_ID=<your company id> and LOOP_PANTRY=<your ticket folder>. Put your real company URL / pantry path in recipes/local/ (gitignored) — never here.
